changes: This standalone mission resource has moved to the new lyre_illegalmissions DLC structure.
lyre_bridge is open source and is not included in Granted Assets ZIPs; download it here: https://github.com/lyrescripts/lyre_bridge
Install/update lyre_illegalmissions and lyre_bridge, then enable the matching DLC module from the new release package.
Do not mix this old standalone folder with the new base + DLC package.
Add teamMembers argument on alertJob function
